# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

def validateImageTag(String tag) {
    if (!tag || tag.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("Image tag cannot be empty")
    }
    if (!tag.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]{0,127}$/)) {
        error("Invalid image tag format. Must be alphanumeric with dots, dashes, underscores, max 128 chars")
    }
    def blockedPatterns = ['latest', 'prod', 'production', 'master', 'main']
    if (blockedPatterns.any { tag.toLowerCase().contains(it) }) {
        echo "Warning: Tag contains sensitive keyword: ${tag}"
    }
    return tag
}

def validateRegistryUrl(String registry) {
    if (!registry || registry.trim().isEmpty()) {
        error("Registry URL cannot be empty")
    }
    if (!registry.matches(/^[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?(\.[a-zA-Z0-9]([a-zA-Z0-9-]{0,61}[a-zA-Z0-9])?)*(\:[0-9]{1,5})?(\/[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)*$/)) {
        error("Invalid registry URL format")
    }
    def allowedRegistries = [
        'docker.io',
        'gcr.io',
        'registry.hub.docker.com',
        'quay.io',
        'ghcr.io',
        'your-company-registry.com'
    ]
    def isAllowed = allowedRegistries.any { registry.contains(it) }
    if (!isAllowed) {
        error("Registry ${registry} is not in the allowed list")
    }
    return registry
}

def sanitizeInput(String input) {
    if (!input) {
        return ''
    }
    def dangerous = ['&&', '||', ';', '|', '`', '$', '(', ')', '<', '>', '\\', '"', "'", '\n', '\r']
    dangerous.each { pattern ->
        if (input.contains(pattern)) {
            error("Input contains forbidden characters: ${pattern}")
        }
    }
    return input.trim()
}

def validateDockerfile(String path) {
    if (!fileExists(path)) {
        error("Dockerfile not found at: ${path}")
    }
    def content = readFile(path)
    if (content.contains('--privileged')) {
        error("Dockerfile contains privileged mode which is not allowed")
    }
    if (content =~ /ADD\s+http/) {
        echo "Warning: Dockerfile uses ADD with URL, consider using COPY instead"
    }
}

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'v1.0.0',
            description: 'Docker image tag (alphanumeric, dots, dashes, underscores only)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: 'docker.io/myorg',
            description: 'Docker registry URL (must be from approved list)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'myapp',
            description: 'Docker image name'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH',
            defaultValue: 'Dockerfile',
            description: 'Path to Dockerfile'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_CONTEXT',
            choices: ['.', 'src', 'app'],
            description: 'Docker build context directory'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SCAN_IMAGE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run security scan on built image'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'PUSH_IMAGE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Push image to registry'
        )
    }
    
    environment {
        DOCKER_BUILDKIT = '1'
        DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST = '1'
    }
    
    options {
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
        timeout(time: 30, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Validating build parameters..."
                    
                    env.VALIDATED_TAG = validateImageTag(sanitizeInput(params.IMAGE_TAG))
                    env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY = validateRegistryUrl(sanitizeInput(params.REGISTRY_URL))
                    env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME = sanitizeInput(params.IMAGE_NAME)
                    env.VALIDATED_DOCKERFILE = sanitizeInput(params.DOCKERFILE_PATH)
                    
                    if (!env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME.matches(/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]{0,127}$/)) {
                        error("Invalid image name format")
                    }
                    
                    env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME = "${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:${env.VALIDATED_TAG}"
                    
                    echo "Validated image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Dockerfile path: ${env.VALIDATED_DOCKERFILE}"
                    echo "Build context: ${params.BUILD_CONTEXT}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Validate Dockerfile') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Validating Dockerfile..."
                    validateDockerfile(env.VALIDATED_DOCKERFILE)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Building Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    
                    def buildArgs = [
                        "--file ${env.VALIDATED_DOCKERFILE}",
                        "--tag ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}",
                        "--label build.number=${env.BUILD_NUMBER}",
                        "--label build.url=${env.BUILD_URL}",
                        "--label git.commit=${env.GIT_COMMIT ?: 'unknown'}",
                        "--label build.date=\$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')",
                        "--no-cache",
                        "--pull"
                    ].join(' ')
                    
                    sh """
                        set -e
                        cd ${params.BUILD_CONTEXT}
                        docker build ${buildArgs} .
                    """
                    
                    echo "Image built successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Scan Image') {
            when {
                expression { params.SCAN_IMAGE == true }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Scanning image for vulnerabilities..."
                    
                    try {
                        sh """
                            docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
                                aquasec/trivy:latest image \
                                --severity HIGH,CRITICAL \
                                --exit-code 0 \
                                --no-progress \
                                ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}
                        """
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Security scan completed with findings: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Tag Additional Versions') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Creating additional tags..."
                    
                    def shortCommit = env.GIT_COMMIT ? env.GIT_COMMIT.take(7) : env.BUILD_NUMBER
                    def additionalTag = "${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY}/${env.VALIDATED_IMAGE_NAME}:build-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}"
                    
                    sh """
                        docker tag ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME} ${additionalTag}
                    """
                    
                    env.ADDITIONAL_TAG = additionalTag
                    echo "Additional tag created: ${additionalTag}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Push to Registry') {
            when {
                expression { params.PUSH_IMAGE == true }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing image to registry..."
                    
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: 'docker-registry-credentials',
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh """
                            set +x
                            echo "\${REGISTRY_PASS}" | docker login ${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY} -u "\${REGISTRY_USER}" --password-stdin
                            set -x
                            
                            docker push ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}
                            docker push ${env.ADDITIONAL_TAG}
                            
                            docker logout ${env.VALIDATED_REGISTRY}
                        """
                    }
                    
                    echo "Images pushed successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Generate SBOM') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Generating Software Bill of Materials..."
                    
                    try {
                        sh """
                            docker run --rm -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \
                                anchore/syft:latest \
                                ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME} \
                                -o json > sbom-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}.json
                        """
                        archiveArtifacts artifacts: "sbom-${env.BUILD_NUMBER}.json", allowEmptyArchive: true
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "SBOM generation failed: ${e.message}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Image Digest') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Retrieving image digest..."
                    
                    def digest = sh(
                        script: "docker inspect --format='{{index .RepoDigests 0}}' ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME} || echo 'N/A'",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim()
                    
                    echo "Image Digest: ${digest}"
                    
                    currentBuild.description = """
                        Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}
                        Digest: ${digest}
                    """.stripIndent()
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "Cleaning up local images..."
                sh """
                    docker rmi ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME} || true
                    docker rmi ${env.ADDITIONAL_TAG} || true
                    docker system prune -f || true
                """
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
            echo "Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed. Check logs for details."
        }
    }
}
